title: Figure 3 in The Anopheles (Anopheles) maculipennis complex (Diptera: Culicidae) in Greece
author: Linton, Yvonne-Marie
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 3. Schematic diagram of the proposed restriction patterns of (1) Anopheles maculipennis, (2) An. messeae, (3) An. melanoon, and (4) An. sacharovi after digestion with the enzyme Hsp92 II.
